description: Black backpackOne haul loop, two padded and adjustable shoulder strapsTwo main zip compartments, has a padded laptop sleeve secured with a Velcro closure, two slip pockets, a zip mesh pocket and four card holdersThree zip pockets on the frontA mesh pocket with elasticated mouth on the sides, has adjustable straps at the sides with click-clasp strapsPadded back with mesh panellingEco friendly, PVC-free, recyclableWarranty: 5 years carry-in warranty against manufacturing defectsPlease note that the thread colour in the brand logo may vary from the image shownNote: The inner lining material/colour may vary from what is shown in the image
